summary: Documented role/worktree/SHA isolation discipline and created TASK-070 to implement metadata contracts for claims, validation reports, graph views, and tests.
knowledge_changes: .codewiki/kb/system/validation-gateway.md adds isolation evidence and SHA definitions.
.codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md clarifies claims vs worktrees vs validation judgment.
.codewiki/kb/system/graph.md requires graph exposure of role/worktree and validation isolation metadata.
roadmap_changes: TASK-070 created with acceptance for claim metadata, validation isolation evidence, graph visibility, backward compatibility, and tests.
